case_groups.title: Schema source and acquisition
case_groups.purpose: Pin exact schema source, digest, redirect, network, size, and parse behavior.

case_groups.title: Resource and scope schema precedence
case_groups.purpose: Preserve Resource and Instrumentation Scope schema URLs and apply exact contained-signal precedence.

case_groups.title: Schema transformation lineage
case_groups.purpose: Apply only pinned transformations while retaining original input, loss, failures, and authority boundaries.

case_groups.title: Resource detection and merge provenance
case_groups.purpose: Record detector source, order, configuration, merge precedence, conflicts, and drift without identity elevation.

case_groups.title: Development OTel Entity quarantine
case_groups.purpose: Keep OTel Entity and OTEL_ENTITIES as untrusted observation material distinct from TMAI Digital Entity.

case_groups.title: Telemetry data governance and tenant isolation
case_groups.purpose: Minimize sensitive telemetry, bind retention and access policy, isolate tenants, and prevent quarantine payloads from becoming authority-bearing records.

case_groups.title: Result and authority boundary
case_groups.purpose: Reject synthetic, incomplete, self-authorizing, or gate-closing result claims.

cases.title: Exact pinned schema artifact accepted
cases.stimulus: Use exact URL, final URL, content type, file format, and sha256 digest for schema 1.43.0.
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-024 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before any implementation execution; deployment-path cases additionally require DQ-020.

cases.title: Unpinned runtime schema URL rejected
cases.stimulus: Submit an unreviewed schema URL for runtime retrieval.
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-024 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before any implementation execution; deployment-path cases additionally require DQ-020.

cases.title: Redirect to disallowed destination rejected
cases.stimulus: Resolve an allowlisted URL through a redirect to a private, link-local, credentialed, or unapproved host.
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-024 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before any implementation execution; deployment-path cases additionally require DQ-020.

cases.title: Schema digest drift rejected
cases.stimulus: Provide content at the exact schema URL with a digest different from the frozen digest.
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-024 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before any implementation execution; deployment-path cases additionally require DQ-020.

cases.title: Schema unavailable or timeout blocks transformation
cases.stimulus: Make the frozen schema artifact unavailable or exceed the acquisition timeout.
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-024 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before any implementation execution; deployment-path cases additionally require DQ-020.

cases.title: Invalid media, size, decompression, or parse rejected
cases.stimulus: Provide wrong media type, oversize, compressed amplification, malformed YAML, or unsupported file format.
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-024 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before any implementation execution; deployment-path cases additionally require DQ-020.

cases.title: DNS rebinding redirect loop and excessive hop rejected
cases.stimulus: Resolve an allowlisted schema URL through DNS rebinding, a redirect loop, an excessive redirect chain, or an address that changes into a private or link-local range.
required_assertions: Every hop and resolved address is revalidated
Redirect count and resolution time are bounded
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-024 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before any implementation execution; deployment-path cases additionally require DQ-020.

cases.title: Mutable poisoned or cross-version cache entry rejected
cases.stimulus: Replace a cached immutable schema artifact, alias a different version to the frozen URL, or serve a cache entry whose URL, final URL, content digest, or file format binding differs.
required_assertions: Cache key binds exact URL version digest and format
Cache mutation never becomes a silent transform input
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-024 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before any implementation execution; deployment-path cases additionally require DQ-020.

cases.title: Scope schema URL takes contained-signal precedence
cases.stimulus: Provide non-empty Resource and Instrumentation Scope schema URLs for the same signal batch.
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-024 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before any implementation execution; deployment-path cases additionally require DQ-020.

cases.title: Empty scope inherits non-empty resource schema
cases.stimulus: Provide an empty Scope schema URL and a non-empty Resource schema URL.
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-024 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before any implementation execution; deployment-path cases additionally require DQ-020.

cases.title: Both schema URLs empty remain unknown
cases.stimulus: Provide empty Resource and Scope schema URLs.
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-024 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before any implementation execution; deployment-path cases additionally require DQ-020.

cases.title: Cross-family scope override is not silent
cases.stimulus: Provide Resource and Scope URLs from different schema families.
required_assertions: Precedence does not hide family conflict
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-024 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before any implementation execution; deployment-path cases additionally require DQ-020.

cases.title: Trace metric and log scope bindings remain separate
cases.stimulus: Provide different scope schema bindings across Trace, Metric, and Log batches.
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-024 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before any implementation execution; deployment-path cases additionally require DQ-020.

cases.title: Supported pinned rename transforms with lineage
cases.stimulus: Apply an exact source-to-target rename defined by the pinned schema artifact.
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-024 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before any implementation execution; deployment-path cases additionally require DQ-020.

cases.title: Breaking or impossible transformation blocks
cases.stimulus: Request a conversion that the pinned schema marks impossible or cannot express.
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-024 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before any implementation execution; deployment-path cases additionally require DQ-020.

cases.title: Original projection remains immutable
cases.stimulus: Transform a valid input then attempt to overwrite the original projection.
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-024 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before any implementation execution; deployment-path cases additionally require DQ-020.

cases.title: Transformer artifact and environment are digest bound
cases.stimulus: Execute with an unpinned transformer version, artifact, config, or runtime environment.
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-024 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before any implementation execution; deployment-path cases additionally require DQ-020.

cases.title: Unknown transformation type rejected
cases.stimulus: Insert a transform type absent from the frozen schema file format.
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-024 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before any implementation execution; deployment-path cases additionally require DQ-020.

cases.title: Transformation cannot generate authority fields
cases.stimulus: Attempt to produce tmai.*, dbos.*, saee.*, permission, authorization, evidence, or verification fields.
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-024 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before any implementation execution; deployment-path cases additionally require DQ-020.

cases.title: Matching non-empty Resource schema URLs merge
cases.stimulus: Merge Resources with the same non-empty schema URL and deterministic detector order.
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-024 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before any implementation execution; deployment-path cases additionally require DQ-020.

cases.title: Old empty and updating non-empty schema merge
cases.stimulus: Merge old Resource with empty URL and updating Resource with a frozen non-empty URL.
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-024 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before any implementation execution; deployment-path cases additionally require DQ-020.

cases.title: Updating empty and old non-empty schema merge
cases.stimulus: Merge updating Resource with empty URL into old Resource with a frozen non-empty URL.
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-024 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before any implementation execution; deployment-path cases additionally require DQ-020.

cases.title: Conflicting non-empty Resource schema URLs fail closed
cases.stimulus: Merge Resources with different non-empty schema URLs.
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-024 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before any implementation execution; deployment-path cases additionally require DQ-020.

cases.title: Malformed OTEL_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTES discarded as a whole
cases.stimulus: Provide a percent-decoding or key-value syntax error in OTEL_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTES.
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-024 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before any implementation execution; deployment-path cases additionally require DQ-020.

cases.title: User precedence over environment is not authority
cases.stimulus: Provide conflicting user Resource and OTEL_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTES values.
required_assertions: User value wins per SDK rule
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-024 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before any implementation execution; deployment-path cases additionally require DQ-020.

cases.title: Detector name order config or output drift fails closed
cases.stimulus: Change detector name, duplicate a name, reorder detectors, change config, or drift identity-like output.
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-024 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before any implementation execution; deployment-path cases additionally require DQ-020.

cases.title: Development OTel Entity input is quarantined
cases.stimulus: Provide a structurally valid OTel Entity from the Development model.
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-024 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before any implementation execution; deployment-path cases additionally require DQ-020.

cases.title: OTel Entity cannot become TMAI Digital Entity
cases.stimulus: Use OTel Entity type and ID fields as DBOS entity_type and entity_id.
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-024 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before any implementation execution; deployment-path cases additionally require DQ-020.

cases.title: Valid OTEL_ENTITIES remains untrusted
cases.stimulus: Provide valid OTEL_ENTITIES service, host, container, or Kubernetes definitions.
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-024 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before any implementation execution; deployment-path cases additionally require DQ-020.

cases.title: Malformed OTEL_ENTITIES partial handling retains warnings
cases.stimulus: Mix valid and malformed OTEL_ENTITIES segments.
required_assertions: No canonical merge from partial parse
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-024 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before any implementation execution; deployment-path cases additionally require DQ-020.

cases.title: Duplicate last-wins Entity does not prove continuity
cases.stimulus: Provide duplicate same-type same-ID Entity entries with conflicting descriptions.
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-024 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before any implementation execution; deployment-path cases additionally require DQ-020.

cases.title: Different Entity schema URLs do not merge
cases.stimulus: Provide same type and ID attributes with different schema URLs.
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-024 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before any implementation execution; deployment-path cases additionally require DQ-020.

cases.title: Compatible OTel Entity merge remains observation
cases.stimulus: Merge same type, identical ID attributes, and same schema URL.
required_assertions: No DBOS Federation or Entity creation
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-024 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before any implementation execution; deployment-path cases additionally require DQ-020.

cases.title: Injected service instance and infrastructure IDs do not bind DBOS
cases.stimulus: Inject service.instance.id, host.id, container.id, or k8s UID as DBOS identity references.
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-024 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before any implementation execution; deployment-path cases additionally require DQ-020.

cases.title: Sensitive attributes require classification and minimization
cases.stimulus: Provide Resource or OTel Entity attributes containing personal, credential, token, secret, or regulated-data patterns without an approved field policy.
required_assertions: Unapproved sensitive fields do not enter trusted projections
Diagnostics do not echo secret values
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-024 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before any implementation execution; deployment-path cases additionally require DQ-020.

cases.title: Raw retention requires an explicit policy binding
cases.stimulus: Retain original telemetry or a transformation input without purpose, retention class, expiry or disposition, access policy, and subject or tenant scope.
required_assertions: Original retention is policy-bound rather than indefinite
No transformation result is promoted while the retention contract is missing
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-024 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before any implementation execution; deployment-path cases additionally require DQ-020.

cases.title: Cross-tenant provenance and cache access is denied
cases.stimulus: Request another tenant's raw telemetry, quarantine payload, transformation lineage, detector output, cache entry, or result evidence by guessing references.
required_assertions: Tenant and purpose scope are checked before access
References do not disclose payload or existence across tenants
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-024 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before any implementation execution; deployment-path cases additionally require DQ-020.

cases.title: Quarantine projection cannot carry canonical authority fields
cases.stimulus: Place entity_id, capability_id, permission, authorization, lifecycle_state, evidence truth, or verification fields into an OTel Entity quarantine projection.
required_assertions: Quarantine namespace has no canonical authority projection
Promotion requires a separate DBOS admission and registration path
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-024 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before any implementation execution; deployment-path cases additionally require DQ-020.

cases.title: Access export and disposition events remain auditable
cases.stimulus: Read, export, expire, redact, or disposition retained original or quarantined telemetry without an append-only governance event and policy reference.
required_assertions: Data operations require actor purpose policy and timestamp lineage
Disposition does not rewrite historical conformance results
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-024 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before any implementation execution; deployment-path cases additionally require DQ-020.

cases.title: Result references do not embed raw sensitive payloads
cases.stimulus: Embed raw telemetry, environment values, secret material, or OTel Entity descriptions in a conformance result or diagnostic field instead of a policy-scoped digest reference.
required_assertions: Result contains references and digests rather than sensitive payload
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-024 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before any implementation execution; deployment-path cases additionally require DQ-020.

cases.title: Conformance result is evidence input not a gate decision
cases.stimulus: Consume a PASS result directly as deployment, identity, permission, evidence-truth, or production authorization without an independent governance decision.
required_assertions: Result is bounded evidence input only
Human gate authority and independent decision record remain required
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-024 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before any implementation execution; deployment-path cases additionally require DQ-020.

cases.title: Synthetic result cannot PASS
cases.stimulus: Set synthetic_example=true and result=PASS.
required_assertions: Synthetic result forced to DRAFT NOT_ASSESSED
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-024 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before any implementation execution; deployment-path cases additionally require DQ-020.

cases.title: Incomplete digest decision validator or review cannot PASS
cases.stimulus: Omit any required source, profile, catalog, implementation, environment, Decision, validator, or independent review binding.
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-024 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before any implementation execution; deployment-path cases additionally require DQ-020.

cases.title: Successful schema pipeline creates no Evidence or Truth
cases.stimulus: Complete all schema and Resource checks then assert Evidence, Verification, Identity, or Truth creation.
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-024 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before any implementation execution; deployment-path cases additionally require DQ-020.

cases.title: Conformance result cannot close production gate
cases.stimulus: Set closes_production_gate or declares_production_ready to true.
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-024 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before any implementation execution; deployment-path cases additionally require DQ-020.
